search.query: index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit | stats count by analyst | fields analyst | append [| rest /services/authentication/users | rename title AS analyst | eval _live="1" | fields analyst _live] | stats values(_live) as _live by analyst | eventstats count(_live) as _known_users | eval analyst_label=case(_known_users==0, analyst, isnull(_live), analyst." (retired)", true(), analyst) | sort analyst | table analyst_label analyst
index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit | dedup detection_rule | sort detection_rule | table detection_rule

index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | eval rem_user_rows = case(action="row_removed" OR action="row_removed_multiple", removed_row_count, true(), 0) | eval rem_auto_rows = case(action="auto_removed", removed_row_count, true(), 0) | stats sum(added_row_count) as r_added sum(rem_user_rows) as r_removed sum(edited_row_count) as r_edited sum(rem_auto_rows) as r_auto sum(eval(if(action="revert",1,0))) as r_revert sum(eval(if(action="column_removed" OR action="column_added",column_count,0))) as r_cols sum(eval(if(action="row_reordered" OR action="column_reordered",1,0))) as r_reorder sum(eval(if(action="column_renamed",1,0))) as r_rename | eval total_changes=coalesce(r_added,0)+coalesce(r_removed,0)+coalesce(r_edited,0)+coalesce(r_auto,0)+coalesce(r_revert,0)+coalesce(r_cols,0)+coalesce(r_reorder,0)+coalesce(r_rename,0) | table total_changes

index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="row_added" | stats sum(added_row_count) as total_rows_added | append [| makeresults count=1 | eval total_rows_added=0] | stats max(total_rows_added) as total_rows_added

index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="row_removed" OR action="row_removed_multiple" | stats sum(removed_row_count) as total_rows_removed | append [| makeresults count=1 | eval total_rows_removed=0] | stats max(total_rows_removed) as total_rows_removed

index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="auto_removed" | stats sum(removed_row_count) as total_rows_auto_removed | append [| makeresults count=1 | eval total_rows_auto_removed=0] | stats max(total_rows_auto_removed) as total_rows_auto_removed

index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="row_edited" | stats sum(edited_row_count) as total_rows_edited | append [| makeresults count=1 | eval total_rows_edited=0] | stats max(total_rows_edited) as total_rows_edited
index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="row_reordered" | stats count as total_rows_reordered

index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="column_added" | stats sum(column_count) as total_columns_added | append [| makeresults count=1 | eval total_columns_added=0] | stats max(total_columns_added) as total_columns_added

index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="column_removed" | stats sum(column_count) as total_columns_removed | append [| makeresults count=1 | eval total_columns_removed=0] | stats max(total_columns_removed) as total_columns_removed

index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="column_renamed" | stats sum(column_count) as total_columns_renamed | append [| makeresults count=1 | eval total_columns_renamed=0] | stats max(total_columns_renamed) as total_columns_renamed
index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="column_reordered" | stats count as total_columns_reordered
index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="revert" | stats count as total_reverts
index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="audit_exported" | stats count as total_audit_exported
index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="csv_exported" | stats count as total_csv_exported
index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="csv_imported" | stats count as total_csv_imported
index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="csv_created" | stats count as total_csv_created
index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="csv_removed" | stats count as total_csv_removed
index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="dr_created" | stats count as total_dr_created
index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="dr_removed" | stats count as total_dr_removed
index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="request_submitted" | stats count as total_requests_submitted
index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="request_approved" | stats count as total_requests_approved
index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="request_rejected" | stats count as total_requests_rejected
index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="request_failed" | stats count as total_requests_failed
index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="request_cancelled" | stats count as total_requests_cancelled

index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where match(action, "^(row_added|row_removed|row_removed_multiple|row_edited|row_reordered|auto_removed|revert|column_added|column_removed|column_renamed|column_reordered)$") | stats values(value{}) as value values(*) as * by action csv_file analyst timestamp | sort -timestamp | eval epoch_ts=timestamp | eval timestamp=if(match(timestamp, "^\d+\.?\d*$"), strftime(timestamp, "%d-%m-%Y %H:%M:%S GMT%:::z"), timestamp)
| eval action_label=case( action=="row_removed_multiple", "removed", action=="row_removed", "removed", action=="auto_removed", "auto removed", action=="row_edited", "edited", action=="row_added", "added", action=="revert", "reverted", action=="column_removed", "removed column", action=="column_added", "added column", action=="row_reordered", "reordered row", action=="column_reordered", "reordered column", action=="column_renamed", "renamed column" )
| eval row_change_count=case( action=="row_removed_multiple", removed_row_count, action=="row_removed", removed_row_count, action=="auto_removed", removed_row_count, action=="row_edited", edited_row_count, action=="row_added", added_row_count, action=="row_reordered", 1 )
| eval column_change_count=case( action=="column_removed", column_count, action=="column_added", column_count, action=="column_reordered", 1, action=="column_renamed", column_count )
| eval col_names=mvjoin('columns{}', ", ")
| eval summary=case( action_label="reverted", "User ".analyst." ".action_label." ".csv_file." ".reverted_from_version." ".row_count_before." row(s) version to ".reverted_to_version." ".row_count_after." row(s) version (which became the latest in the record ".new_record_version.") at ".timestamp, action=="column_removed", "User ".analyst." ".action_label." ".col_names." from ".csv_file." (".column_change_count." column(s), detection rule - ".detection_rule.") at ".timestamp, action=="column_added", "User ".analyst." ".action_label." ".col_names." to ".csv_file." (".column_change_count." column(s), detection rule - ".detection_rule.") at ".timestamp, action=="row_reordered", "User ".analyst." ".action_label." in ".csv_file." from position #".row_number_before." to #".row_number_after." (detection rule - ".detection_rule.") at ".timestamp, action=="column_reordered", "User ".analyst." ".action_label." '".column_name."' in ".csv_file." from position #".column_number_before." to #".column_number_after." (detection rule - ".detection_rule.") at ".timestamp, action=="column_renamed", "User ".analyst." ".action_label." '".column_renamed_before."' to '".column_renamed_after."' in ".csv_file." (detection rule - ".detection_rule.") at ".timestamp, 1==1, "User ".analyst." ".action_label." ".row_change_count." row(s) from ".csv_file." (detection rule - ".detection_rule.") at ".timestamp ) | eval reason=coalesce(row_remove_reason, row_add_reason, revert_reason, row_edit_reason, column_remove_reason, comment, "") | eval _total_rows=coalesce(row_change_count, column_change_count, 0) | eval value_count=mvcount(value) | eval value_preview=if(value_count > 10, mvjoin(mvindex(value, 0, 9), " ") . " ... +" . (value_count - 10) . " more field entries" . if(_total_rows > 0 AND _total_rows != value_count, " (" . _total_rows . " rows affected — click row for details)", " (click row for details)"), mvjoin(value, " ")) | table timestamp epoch_ts action analyst csv_file detection_rule reason row_change_count column_change_count request_id value_preview summary | rename value_preview AS value

index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action="$detail_action$" analyst="$detail_analyst$" csv_file="$detail_csv$" | where timestamp="$detail_ts$" OR timestamp=$detail_ts$ | head 1 | stats values(value{}) as value | mvexpand value | table value

index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where match(action, "^request_|^audit_exported$|^csv_exported$|^csv_imported$|^csv_created$|^dr_created$|^dr_removed$|^csv_removed$|^trash_") | eval csv_file=if(isnull(csv_file) OR csv_file="", "N/A", csv_file) | stats values(*) as * by action csv_file analyst timestamp | sort -timestamp | eval epoch_ts=timestamp | eval timestamp=if(match(timestamp, "^\d+\.?\d*$"), strftime(timestamp, "%d-%m-%Y %H:%M:%S GMT%:::z"), timestamp)
| eval action_label=case( action=="audit_exported", "exported audit", action=="csv_exported", "exported CSV", action=="csv_imported", "imported CSV", action=="csv_created", "created CSV", action=="dr_created", "created detection rule", action=="dr_removed", "removed rule", action=="csv_removed", "removed CSV", action=="request_submitted", "submitted request", action=="request_approved", "approved request", action=="request_rejected", "rejected request", action=="request_failed", "failed request", action=="request_cancelled", "cancelled request", action=="request_auto_cancelled", "auto-cancelled request", action=="trash_restored", "restored from trash", action=="trash_purged", "permanently purged", action=="trash_retention_changed","changed trash retention" )
| eval summary=case( action=="audit_exported", "User ".analyst." ".if(status=="success","successfully","unsuccessfully")." exported ".export_file." audit file containing ".event_count." event(s) for ".csv_file." (detection rule - ".detection_rule.") at ".timestamp, action=="csv_exported", "User ".analyst." ".if(status=="success","successfully","unsuccessfully")." exported ".export_file." containing ".row_count." row(s) for ".csv_file." (detection rule - ".detection_rule.") at ".timestamp, action=="csv_imported", "User ".analyst." ".if(status=="success","successfully","unsuccessfully")." ".import_mode." ".export_file." into ".csv_file." (".imported_row_count." row(s), detection rule - ".detection_rule.") at ".timestamp, action=="csv_created", "User ".analyst." created CSV ".csv_file." with ".column_count." column(s) for detection rule ".detection_rule." at ".timestamp, action=="dr_created", "User ".analyst." created new detection rule ".detection_rule." at ".timestamp, action=="dr_removed", "User ".analyst." ".case(removal_type=="trashed","moved to trash",removal_type=="permanent","permanently deleted",1==1,"unlinked")." rule ".detection_rule." (".csv_count." CSV file(s): ".csv_files.") — ".comment." at ".timestamp, action=="csv_removed", "User ".analyst." ".case(removal_type=="trashed","moved to trash",removal_type=="permanent","permanently deleted",1==1,"unlinked")." CSV ".csv_file." from rule ".detection_rule.if(rule_also_removed=="true"," (last CSV — rule also removed)","")." — ".comment." at ".timestamp, action=="request_submitted", "User ".analyst." submitted ".approval_action_type." request for ".csv_file." - ".description." (detection rule - ".detection_rule.") at ".timestamp, action=="request_approved", "User ".analyst." approved ".approval_action_type." request created by ".requester." for ".csv_file." (detection rule - ".detection_rule.") at ".timestamp, action=="request_rejected", "User ".analyst." rejected ".approval_action_type." request created by ".requester." for ".csv_file." (reason: ".rejection_reason.") (detection rule - ".detection_rule.") at ".timestamp, action=="request_failed", "User ".analyst." failed to approve ".approval_action_type." request created by ".requester." for ".csv_file." (reason: ".failure_reason.") (detection rule - ".detection_rule.") at ".timestamp, action=="request_cancelled", "User ".analyst." cancelled their ".approval_action_type." request for ".csv_file." (reason: ".cancellation_reason.") (detection rule - ".detection_rule.") at ".timestamp, action=="request_auto_cancelled", "System auto-cancelled ".approval_action_type." request by ".analyst." for ".csv_file." (detection rule - ".detection_rule.") — ".comment." at ".timestamp, action=="trash_restored", "User ".analyst." restored ".item_type." '".name."' from trash (originally deleted by ".original_deleted_by." on ".original_deleted_at.") — ".comment." at ".timestamp, action=="trash_purged", "User ".analyst." permanently purged ".item_type." '".name."' from trash — ".comment." at ".timestamp, action=="trash_retention_changed", "User ".analyst." changed trash retention from ".old_retention_days." to ".new_retention_days." days — ".comment." at ".timestamp ) | eval reason=coalesce(row_remove_reason, row_add_reason, revert_reason, row_edit_reason, column_remove_reason, rejection_reason, failure_reason, cancellation_reason, comment, "") | table timestamp epoch_ts action analyst csv_file detection_rule reason request_id approval_action_type requester status export_file summary

index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ | where match(action, "^(limit_change|admin_limit_change|limit_defaults_saved|dual_approval_submitted|dual_approval_approved|dual_approval_rejected|factory_reset_executed|mass_usage_reset_executed|emergency_lockdown_activated|emergency_lockdown_deactivated|trash_purged|bootstrap_csv_hashes|bootstrap_csv_hash_changed|fim_deploy_window_start|fim_deploy_window_end)$") | eval epoch_ts=_time | stats values(*) as * by action analyst epoch_ts | sort -epoch_ts | eval timestamp=strftime(epoch_ts, "%d-%m-%Y %H:%M:%S GMT%:::z")
| eval severity=case( action=="emergency_lockdown_activated", "CRITICAL", action=="bootstrap_csv_hash_changed", "CRITICAL", action=="emergency_lockdown_deactivated", "HIGH", action=="factory_reset_executed", "HIGH", action=="mass_usage_reset_executed", "HIGH", action=="trash_purged", "HIGH", action=="bootstrap_csv_hashes", "HIGH", action=="fim_deploy_window_start", "HIGH", action=="dual_approval_submitted", "MEDIUM", action=="dual_approval_approved", "MEDIUM", action=="dual_approval_rejected", "LOW", action=="admin_limit_change", "MEDIUM", action=="limit_defaults_saved", "MEDIUM", action=="limit_change", "LOW", action=="fim_deploy_window_end", "INFO", 1==1, "INFO" )
| eval action_label=case( action=="limit_change", "Analyst Limits Changed", action=="admin_limit_change", "Admin Limits Changed", action=="limit_defaults_saved", "Limit Defaults Saved", action=="dual_approval_submitted", "Dual-Approval Submitted", action=="dual_approval_approved", "Dual-Approval Approved", action=="dual_approval_rejected", "Dual-Approval Rejected", action=="factory_reset_executed", "Factory Reset Executed", action=="mass_usage_reset_executed", "Mass Usage Reset", action=="emergency_lockdown_activated", "LOCKDOWN ACTIVATED", action=="emergency_lockdown_deactivated", "Lockdown Deactivated", action=="trash_purged", "Trash Purged", action=="bootstrap_csv_hashes", "CSV Hash Registry Bootstrap", action=="bootstrap_csv_hash_changed", "CSV Hash CHANGED at Bootstrap", action=="fim_deploy_window_start", "FIM Deploy Window Opened", action=="fim_deploy_window_end", "FIM Deploy Window Closed", 1==1, action )
| eval details=case( action=="limit_change", coalesce(change_count, "?")." setting(s) changed for ".coalesce(target_analyst, "(self)"), action=="admin_limit_change", coalesce(change_count, "?")." admin limit(s) changed", action=="limit_defaults_saved", "Analyst-limit defaults updated by superadmin", action=="dual_approval_submitted", "Action: ".coalesce(approval_action_type, "?")." — ".coalesce(comment, "(no comment)"), action=="dual_approval_approved", "Approved ".coalesce(approval_action_type, "?")." by ".coalesce(requester, "?")." — ".coalesce(admin_comment, "(no comment)"), action=="dual_approval_rejected", "Rejected ".coalesce(approval_action_type, "?")." by ".coalesce(requester, "?")." — ".coalesce(admin_comment, "(no comment)"), action=="factory_reset_executed", "All analyst limits reset to factory defaults (dual-approved)", action=="mass_usage_reset_executed", "All analyst counters reset to zero (dual-approved)", action=="emergency_lockdown_activated", "Reason: ".coalesce(reason, "(no reason given)"), action=="emergency_lockdown_deactivated", "Originally locked by ".coalesce(originally_locked_by, "(unknown)"), action=="trash_purged", coalesce(item_type, "item")." '".coalesce(name, "(unknown)")."' permanently deleted".if(dual_approved=="True"," (dual-approved)",""), action=="bootstrap_csv_hashes", "Re-bootstrapped expected-hash registry: ".coalesce(hashed_count, "?")." CSVs hashed, ".coalesce(changed_count, "0")." changed, ".coalesce(missing_count, "0")." missing", action=="bootstrap_csv_hash_changed", "Hash for ".coalesce(csv_file, "(unknown CSV)")." changed during bootstrap — investigate (possible bypass laundering)", action=="fim_deploy_window_start", "Window opened for ".coalesce(duration_minutes, "?")." min — reason: ".coalesce(reason, "(none)"), action=="fim_deploy_window_end", "Window closed", 1==1, coalesce(comment, "") )
| table timestamp epoch_ts severity action_label analyst details request_id

index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_fim | search action=fim_* | where action!="fim_watch_heartbeat" | sort -timestamp | eval epoch_ts=_time | eval timestamp_human=if(isnull(timestamp_human), strftime(timestamp, "%d-%m-%Y %H:%M:%S UTC"), timestamp_human) | eval severity=coalesce(severity, case( action=="fim_baseline_tampered", "CRITICAL", action=="fim_baseline_hmac_mismatch", "CRITICAL", action=="fim_baseline_kv_fs_divergence", "CRITICAL", action=="fim_kv_baseline_checksum_mismatch","CRITICAL", action=="fim_fs_baseline_permission_denied","CRITICAL", action=="fim_fs_baseline_rebuild_failed", "CRITICAL", action=="fim_csv_hash_registry_tampered", "CRITICAL", action=="fim_lookups_dir_unreadable", "CRITICAL", action=="fim_scripted_input_no_session_key","CRITICAL", action=="fim_fs_baseline_missing_or_tampered","HIGH", action=="fim_csv_external_modification", "HIGH", action=="fim_csv_external_deletion", "HIGH", action=="fim_csv_external_creation", "HIGH", action=="fim_csv_unregistered", "HIGH", action=="fim_lookups_dir_mode_changed", "HIGH", action=="fim_file_modified", "HIGH", action=="fim_file_removed", "HIGH", action=="fim_watch_file_modified", "HIGH", action=="fim_watch_file_removed", "HIGH", action=="fim_file_appeared", "MEDIUM", action=="fim_watch_file_appeared", "MEDIUM", action=="fim_baseline_rebuilt_no_source", "MEDIUM", action=="fim_baseline_initialized", "INFO", action=="fim_csv_auto_bootstrap", "INFO", action=="fim_watch_started", "INFO", action=="fim_watch_stopped", "INFO", action=="fim_watch_heartbeat", "INFO", 1==1, "INFO" )) | eval _path=coalesce(monitored_path, path, csv_file, "") | eval summary=case( action=="fim_baseline_initialized", "FIM baseline established (".coalesce(file_count, "?")." files watched)", action=="fim_file_modified" OR action=="fim_watch_file_modified", "File modified outside deploy: ".coalesce(_path, "(unknown path)"), action=="fim_file_removed" OR action=="fim_watch_file_removed", "File removed: ".coalesce(_path, "(unknown path)"), action=="fim_file_appeared" OR action=="fim_watch_file_appeared", "Unexpected file appeared: ".coalesce(_path, "(unknown path)"), action=="fim_baseline_tampered", "FIM baseline tampered (reason: ".coalesce(reason, "unknown").")", action=="fim_baseline_hmac_mismatch", "FIM baseline HMAC did not verify — possible key rotation or attack", action=="fim_baseline_kv_fs_divergence", "Filesystem and KV-store baselines disagree — one source was tampered with (fs=".coalesce(fs_file_count, "?").", kv=".coalesce(kv_file_count, "?").")", action=="fim_kv_baseline_checksum_mismatch", "KV-store baseline HMAC failed; rebuilding from filesystem", action=="fim_fs_baseline_permission_denied", "FIM baseline file unreadable (likely root-owned). Fix: chown splunk:splunk ".coalesce(_path, "the baseline file"), action=="fim_fs_baseline_rebuild_failed", "Cannot rebuild filesystem baseline (reason: ".coalesce(reason, "unknown")."). Operator action required.", action=="fim_fs_baseline_missing_or_tampered", "Filesystem baseline missing/tampered (status: ".coalesce(fs_status, "?").") — KV is now authoritative", action=="fim_baseline_rebuilt_no_source", "FIM baseline rebuilt from scratch — no prior baseline existed in either store", action=="fim_csv_external_modification", "CSV modified outside the handler (bypass attempt): ".coalesce(_path, "(unknown CSV)"), action=="fim_csv_external_deletion", "CSV deleted outside the handler: ".coalesce(_path, "(unknown CSV)"), action=="fim_csv_external_creation", "Unregistered CSV appeared in lookups dir: ".coalesce(_path, "(unknown path)"), action=="fim_csv_unregistered", "Managed CSV is missing from the expected-hash registry: ".coalesce(_path, "(unknown CSV)"), action=="fim_csv_hash_registry_tampered", "CSV hash registry HMAC failed — fail-closed; all CSVs treated as unregistered", action=="fim_csv_auto_bootstrap", "CSV expected-hash registry auto-created on first run (".coalesce(file_count, "?")." CSVs)", action=="fim_lookups_dir_mode_changed", "Lookups directory permission mode changed: ".coalesce(old_mode, "?")." -> ".coalesce(new_mode, "?"), action=="fim_lookups_dir_unreadable", "Lookups directory unreadable — FIM cannot scan", action=="fim_scripted_input_no_session_key", "FIM scripted input has no session key — passAuth dropped or misconfigured", action=="fim_watch_started", "Continuous CSV watcher started", action=="fim_watch_stopped", "Continuous CSV watcher stopped", action=="fim_watch_heartbeat", "Watcher heartbeat (still alive)", 1==1, coalesce(details, action) ) | table timestamp_human severity action _path old_hash new_hash summary epoch_ts | rename _path AS path

index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit_recovery | sort -timestamp | eval epoch_ts=_time | eval timestamp_human=if(isnull(timestamp_human), strftime(timestamp, "%d-%m-%Y %H:%M:%S UTC"), timestamp_human) | eval severity=case( action=="emergency_unlock", "CRITICAL", action=="reset_cooldowns", "HIGH", action=="migrate_cooldowns", "HIGH", action=="fim_deploy_window_start","HIGH", action=="fim_deploy_window_end", "INFO", 1==1, "HIGH" ) | eval _by=coalesce(host_user, "unknown") | eval _ctx=coalesce(container, source, "n/a") | eval _why=coalesce(reason, reason_text, "(no reason given)") | eval _script=coalesce(script, "n/a") | eval summary=case( action=="emergency_unlock", "Emergency unlock script run by " . _by . " on " . _ctx . " — " . _why, action=="reset_cooldowns", "Cooldown reset run by " . _by . " on " . _ctx . " — " . _why, action=="migrate_cooldowns", "Cooldown schema migration v" . coalesce(from_version, "?") . " -> v" . coalesce(to_version, "?") . " (status: " . coalesce(status, "?") . if(isnull(reason_text) OR reason_text=="", "", ", " . reason_text) . ")", action=="fim_deploy_window_start", "FIM deploy window opened by " . _by . " via " . _ctx . " (duration " . coalesce(duration_min, "?") . " min) — " . _why, action=="fim_deploy_window_end", "FIM deploy window closed by " . _by . " via " . _ctx, 1==1, coalesce(details, "Recovery action: " . action . " — script=" . _script . " by=" . _by) ) | table timestamp_human severity action _script _by _ctx summary epoch_ts | rename _script AS script, _by AS host_user, _ctx AS context
| wlexpiringsoon | where "$rule_filter$"="*" OR detection_rule="$rule_filter$" | table detection_rule csv_file Expires value
